profile.name: Swatej Patil
profile.tagline: Defending networks with a hacker's mindset | AI & Cybersecurity Teaching Fellow
profile.summary: Experienced SOC Analyst and Security Engineer with a strong background in threat detection, incident response, and security automation. Currently a Master of Engineering student at Cornell University.

experience.description: Delivered 10+ hands-on AI and cybersecurity workshops for high school students.
achievements: Covered privacy, digital safety, and responsible tech use.
Developed lab guides and troubleshooting documentation that improved onboarding and reduced instructor support needs by 35%.

experience.description: Monitored SIEM alerts and triaged 1k+ security events.
achievements: Monitored SIEM alerts (Splunk, QRadar) involving malware, suspicious logins, and network anomalies.
Analyzed logs across Windows, Linux, firewall, and VPN systems to validate IOCs.
Executed incident response actions including containment, user deactivation, and IP blocking.
Conducted MITRE ATT&CK–aligned threat hunts identifying lateral movement patterns.
Prepared daily SOC reports and refined detection rules, reducing false positives by 18%.

experience.description: Implemented RBAC, secure session handling, and encryption across an energy analytics platform.
achievements: Implemented RBAC, secure session handling, and AES-based data encryption.
Performed API and web security assessments (Burp Suite, OWASP ZAP), identifying 18 critical vulnerabilities.
Conducted secure code reviews for Python/NodeJS services aligned to OWASP Top 10.
Enhanced AWS deployment security through IAM hardening and credential rotation.
Authored deployment runbooks and hardening guides for DevOps and security teams.

projects.title: Security Automation & SOAR Playbook
projects.description: Built end-to-end SOAR playbooks ingesting alerts and automating enrichment.

projects.title: Azure Sentinel SIEM & M365 Defender Lab
projects.description: Built Sentinel SIEM ingesting logs for unified identity threat monitoring.
